name: smart-rename
title: Smart Rename
description: Extension which takes selected items from Finder or File Explorer and intelligently renames them to nicer filenames.
author: nocdn

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: Provider
preferences.description: Choose which AI provider generates rename suggestions.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Your OpenAI API key. Required when Provider is OpenAI.

preferences.name: openaiModel
preferences.title: OpenAI Model
preferences.description: The OpenAI model ID used for rename suggestions.

preferences.name: openaiReasoningEffort
preferences.title: OpenAI Reasoning Level
preferences.description: Reasoning effort for OpenAI reasoning models. none and xhigh are only supported on certain models.

preferences.name: fireworksApiKey
preferences.title: Fireworks API Key
preferences.description: Your Fireworks AI API key. Required when Provider is Fireworks AI.

preferences.name: fireworksModel
preferences.title: Fireworks Model
preferences.description: The Fireworks model ID used for rename suggestions.

preferences.name: fireworksEnableReasoning
preferences.title: Enable reasoning
preferences.description: When enabled, Fireworks uses its default reasoning behavior. When disabled, reasoning is turned off explicitly.
preferences.label: Enable reasoning

preferences.name: renamePrompt
preferences.title: Rename Prompt
preferences.description: Instructions sent to the model for each selected file.
preferences.default: You rename files to clean, human-readable titles. Remove resolution tags, dates, version numbers, download IDs, UUIDs, and random hashes. Remove redundant words like final, copy, and download. Replace dots, underscores, and dashes with spaces. Use Title Case.

commands.name: smart-rename
commands.title: Smart Rename
commands.subtitle: Selected Files
commands.description: Rename selected Finder or File Explorer items using AI

commands.name: undo-rename
commands.title: Undo Rename
commands.subtitle: Smart Rename
commands.description: Undo the most recent Smart Rename batch

commands.name: redo-rename
commands.title: Redo Rename
commands.subtitle: Smart Rename
commands.description: Redo the most recently undone Smart Rename batch

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
